_status: NOT_CAPTURED — BLOCKED on live broker access. Every numeric field below is null. Do not use this file as active_profile in config/costs.json until it is populated by a real scripts/capture_spreads.py run against a live Vantage demo account.
_blocker: See docs/audit/PHASE4_COST_MODEL_BLOCKER.md for the full explanation. Summary: this session has no METAAPI_TOKEN/METAAPI_ACCOUNT_ID credentials, no .env file, and scripts/capture_spreads.py requires polling live market data continuously across multiple real London/New York trading sessions (hours to days), which is not achievable from an automated sandbox session regardless of credentials.
_generator: scripts/capture_spreads.py (existing tool, not modified by this change)
_note_on_session_taxonomy: scripts/capture_spreads.py classifies samples as 'london' | 'new_york' | 'off' (see classify_session()), not the four-way Asian/London/NewYork/Overlap split. This file's structure matches what the existing tool actually produces rather than inventing session buckets it doesn't support.
_note_on_symbols: scripts/capture_spreads.py's default --pairs is EURUSD GBPUSD USDJPY AUDUSD — XAUUSD is NOT in the default list and must be passed explicitly (--pairs EURUSD GBPUSD XAUUSD) when this capture is actually run, per this mission's Phase 4 symbol list.
